title: Immling
description: ***.de is the official website for the Immling Festival, a renowned classical music and opera event held annually at Gut Immling in Halfing, Germany. Running primarily from June to August since 1997, it features high-quality opera productions and symphony concerts in a picturesque setting. In 2026, the festival celebrates its 30th anniversary, remaining a major cultural highlight in the Chiemgau region
